title: Filesystem path traversal via user-supplied --app-code, --area, and artifact ID arguments
description: User-supplied values passed to --app-code and --area (and artifact IDs in tap/act/meo/spec/mistake show commands) were concatenated directly into file paths via path.join() without character validation or root-boundary checks. A crafted value containing ../ or absolute path segments could escape the provenance/ directory and read or write files anywhere the process has access.
impact: Read: arbitrary file disclosure. Write: overwrite of files outside the provenance directory (e.g. .env, SSH keys, git config). Requires attacker to control CLI arguments, which in practice means a malicious script or IDE automation passing crafted values.
mitigation: validateCode() added to utils.ts — enforces ^[A-Z0-9_-]{1,16}$/i allowlist on all --app-code and --area inputs, called in index.ts before every command dispatch. safePath() added to utils.ts — verifies resolved path stays under the artifact directory root, used in all show/done path construction in runtime.ts and artifact.ts. Mitigated in v2.2.0.
